{{Quote|..is how we ''got'' the information. Memorial services for Leftenant Hammertree will be held tomorrow.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="marvel67" />}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Hammertree''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was involved in gathering information regarding the recovery of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] when Solo had been frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and taken by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Hammertree discovered that another bounty hunter had been in league with Fett, but had been cut out of the reward when Fett left [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. He brought this information to the attention of the Rebel leadership, but was killed by unknown causes soon afterward.<ref name="marvel67" />
